📋 클로드 대화 불러오기
기존 클로드 대화창에서 Human: / Claude: 형식으로 붙여넣기 하세요.
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?fam 체시아레
체시아레 데 보르히아
대화를 시작하세요
캐릭터 설정 (시스템 프롬프트)
📋 클로드 대화 불러오기
기존 클로드 대화창에서 Human: / Claude: 형식으로 붙여넣기 하세요.
ily=Noto+Serif+KR:wght@300;400;600&family=Crimson+Pro:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&display=swap'); :root { --bg: #0d0b0f; --surface: #13111a; --surface2: #1a1725; --border: #2a2538; --accent: #b8945a; --accent2: #7c5cbf; --text: #e8e0d4; --text-dim: #7a7080; --user-bg: #1e1a2e; --ai-bg: #16130f; --safe-top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px); --safe-bot: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px); } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } html { height: -webkit-fill-available; } body { height: 100vh; height: -webkit-fill-available; overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', serif; } /* ── App shell ── */ #app { display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; } /* ── Header ── */ #header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: calc(var(--safe-top) + 10px) 16px 10px; background: var(--surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0; gap: 10px; } #header-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--accent); flex-shrink: 0; animation: pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.3} } #header-name { font-family: 'Crimson Pro', 'Georgia', serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.08em; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .icon-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-dim); font-size: 15px; width: 36px; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; transition: all 0.2s; } .icon-btn:active { background: var(--surface2); } /* ── Messages ── */ #messages { flex: 1; min-height: 0; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; padding: 16px 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; } #messages::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .empty-state { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'Crimson Pro', 'Georgia', serif; font-size: 15px; font-style: italic; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 40px 20px; text-align: center; } /* ── Message bubbles ── */ .msg { display: flex; gap: 10px; animation: fadeUp 0.25s ease; max-width: 100%; } @keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(6px)} to{opacity:1;transform:none} } .msg.user { flex-direction: row-reverse; align-self: flex-end; max-width: 88%; } .msg.ai { align-self: flex-start; max-width: 92%; } .msg-avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .msg.user .msg-avatar { background: var(--accent2); font-size: 10px; } .msg.ai .msg-avatar { background: var(--accent); color: #000; } .msg-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; min-width: 0; } .msg.user .msg-body { align-items: flex-end; } .msg-bubble { padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.75; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; } .msg.user .msg-bubble { background: var(--user-bg); border: 1px solid #2e2a45; border-bottom-right-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; } .msg.ai .msg-bubble { background: var(--ai-bg); border: 1px solid #2a2018; border-bottom-left-radius: 3px; font-family: 'Crimson Pro', 'Georgia', serif; font-size: 15px; color: #ede5d8; } /* ── Scene image (inline in chat) ── */ .msg-scene { border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); width: 100%; max-width: 280px; position: relative; cursor: pointer; } .msg-scene img { width: 100%; display: block; object-fit: cover; } .msg-scene .scene-tag { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.65)); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; padding: 18px 8px 5px; text-transform: uppercase; } /* ── Typing indicator ── */ .typing-indicator { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 2px; } .typing-indicator span { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: var(--text-dim); border-radius: 50%; animation: bounce 1.2s infinite; } .typing-indicator span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .typing-indicator span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; } @keyframes bounce { 0%,60%,100%{transform:none} 30%{transform:translateY(-4px)} } /* ── Input bar ── */ #input-bar { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 14px calc(var(--safe-bot) + 10px); background: var(--surface); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0; } #user-input { flex: 1; background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 20px; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 9px 14px; resize: none; outline: none; min-height: 40px; max-height: 120px; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 0.2s; -webkit-appearance: none; } #user-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent2); } #user-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-dim); } #send-btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2)); border: none; border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; min-width: 40px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.1s; flex-shrink: 0; } #send-btn:active { transform: scale(0.92); } #send-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.35; } /* ── Settings drawer (bottom sheet) ── */ #settings-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); z-index: 50; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.25s; } #settings-overlay.show { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; } #settings-sheet { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 18px 18px 0 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0 18px calc(var(--safe-bot) + 20px); z-index: 51; max-height: 85dvh; overflow-y: auto; transform: translateY(100%); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } #settings-sheet.show { transform: none; } .sheet-handle { width: 36px; height: 4px; background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; margin: 12px auto 18px; } .sheet-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .sheet-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: var(--text-dim); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; } #settings-system-prompt { width: 100%; background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', serif; font-size: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; resize: vertical; min-height: 90px; outline: none; -webkit-appearance: none; } .sheet-btn { width: 100%; background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text-dim); font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', serif; font-size: 13px; padding: 10px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: all 0.2s; margin-bottom: 8px; } .sheet-btn:active { background: var(--surface2); } .sheet-btn.accent { border-color: var(--accent2); color: var(--accent2); } /* ── Import modal ── */ #import-modal { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75); z-index: 100; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.25s; } #import-modal.show { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; } #import-box { background: var(--surface); border-radius: 18px 18px 0 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0 18px calc(var(--safe-bot) + 20px); width: 100%; max-height: 90dvh; overflow-y: auto; transform: translateY(100%); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } #import-modal.show #import-box { transform: none; } #import-title { font-family: 'Crimson Pro', 'Georgia', serif; font-size: 17px; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 300; padding-top: 4px; } #import-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.7; } #import-desc b { color: var(--text); } #import-text { background: var(--surface2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', serif; font-size: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; resize: vertical; min-height: 160px; outline: none; width: 100%; -webkit-appearance: none; } #import-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; } #import-cancel-btn, #import-confirm-btn { flex: 1; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 12px; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: opacity 0.2s; } #import-cancel-btn { background: var(--surface2); color: var(--text-dim); } #import-confirm-btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent2), var(--accent)); color: #fff; } #import-confirm-btn:active, #import-cancel-btn:active { opacity: 0.7; } #import-result { font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent); text-align: center; min-height: 16px; padding-bottom: 4px; } /* ── Image overlay ── */ #img-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); z-index: 200; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.25s; } #img-overlay.show { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; } #img-overlay img { max-width: 95vw; max-height: 90dvh; border-radius: 10px; object-fit: contain; transform: scale(0.95); transition: transform 0.25s; } #img-overlay.show img { transform: scale(1); }
